title: pinus halepensis var. genuensis
intro: Pinus halepensis var. genuensis, also known as the Aleppo pine, is a specific variety of pine tree native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pinus halepensis var. genuensis include reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from fever and cough. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the immune system and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
